items.question: Which family scores features independently of any trained predictor?
items.explanation: Filters like mutual information or chi-square compute per-feature scores from data; wrappers and embedded methods depend on model training.

items.question: What does RFE do each iteration?
options: Fits a model, removes least important features, refits
Adds random features until validation improves
Clusters features and picks cluster centroids
items.answer: Fits a model, removes least important features, refits
items.explanation: Recursive Feature Elimination is a wrapper loop: fit → rank → prune → repeat until k features remain.

items.question: Lasso (L1) typically produces coefficients that are:
items.explanation: L1 penalty can shrink coefficients to exact zeros, performing embedded selection in linear models.

items.question: Running SelectKBest on train+test together before splitting mainly risks:
items.explanation: Test labels would influence which features are selected, inflating reported performance.
